sentence_reviews.text: Models learn maps between functions or satisfy differential constraints, enabling learned simulators and surrogate PDE solvers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Li et al. 2020, Fourier Neural Operator for Parametric PDEs, abstract/method.
sentence_reviews.notes: FNO learning mappings between function spaces and surrogate PDE solving are supported; PINN differential-constraint wording is not directly covered by the FNO citation.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs is to connect Fourier, wavelet & spectral transforms, Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers to downstream capabilities including Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins, Weather, climate & geospatial forecasting.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Li et al. 2020 Fourier neural operator and PDE examples; Deep Learning neural-network background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Fourier/spectral transforms and PDE surrogate scientific-ML roles are supported; digital twins and weather/climate forecasting are broader downstream synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Li et al. 2020 parametric PDE surrogate modeling.
sentence_reviews.notes: Scientific simulation/surrogate modeling is supported; digital twins are not directly named.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Weather, climate & geospatial forecasting
sentence_reviews.notes: Operator learning is relevant to PDE-driven forecasting, but the packet evidence does not directly establish weather, climate, or geospatial forecasting.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Fourier, wavelet & spectral transforms, Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Li et al. 2020 spectral convolution/PDE tasks; Deep Learning optimization background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Spectral/PDE dependencies are partly supported; generic limitations are not directly sourced.

sentence_reviews.text: Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Fourier, wavelet & spectral transforms.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Li et al. 2020 Fourier layer/spectral convolution.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported for FNOs by the Fourier-domain operator parameterization.

sentence_reviews.text: Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Li et al. 2020 PDE surrogate tasks.
sentence_reviews.notes: The models target PDE solution operators, but the cited FNO source does not show differentiable solvers as an internal component.

sentence_reviews.text: Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs follows the learning setup expressed by Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Li et al. 2020 PDE/operator learning; AIMA general AI background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Physics-informed is plausible for PINNs, but FNO evidence alone and AIMA do not directly support the full dependency label.

sentence_reviews.text: Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Equivariance, invariance & geometric priors.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Li et al. 2020 operator-learning architecture; Deep Learning representation background.
sentence_reviews.notes: The packet sources do not directly establish equivariance, invariance, or geometric priors as components of this node.

edge_reviews.notes: composes/common is directly supported for FNO; common strength is conservative for the combined node.
PDE solving is the target, but differentiable solvers are not clearly an internal component in the cited evidence.
trained_under/common is plausible for PINNs/physics-informed models but not directly supported for the combined node by packet sources.
No adequate packet evidence for this dependency.
